# jira-hygiene

Enforce JIRA hygiene standards on one or many issues — sets story points, team, components, activity type, fix version, and labels

**Plugin**: [model-serving-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
/jira-hygiene
```
